stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The sketch above indicated a single-cell thunderstorm in the mature stage which is travelling in the direction of the wind arrow. Which of the following statements correctly identifies the likely locations of various weather phenomena?

options.a: Lightning in area D, a gust front in area G, and clear ice in area B.
options.b: Severe turbulence in area E, microbursts in area F, and severe icing in area A.
options.c: Severe icing in area A, lightning in area C, and severe wind shear in area H.
options.d: Severe icing in area E, a gust front in area F, and microbursts in area H.
